task_completion.description: Navigate to the log search or viewing interface in ManageEngine EventLog Analyzer
task_completion.visual_evidence: The ManageEngine EventLog Analyzer web interface is open, specifically on a tab or page used for searching or viewing logs (e.g., 'Search' tab).

task_completion.description: Search or filter for the target user 'forensic_target'
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'forensic_target' is visible in the search bar, advanced search filters, or active filter tags.

task_completion.description: Locate the failed SSH login events for the target user
task_completion.visual_evidence: The search results table displays log entries corresponding to failed SSH logins (e.g., 'Failed password') for the user 'forensic_target'.

task_completion.description: Open the dialog or input field to add a note to the target event
task_completion.visual_evidence: A popup dialog, modal, or inline text area titled 'Add Note', 'Annotate', or similar is open for one of the 'forensic_target' log events.

task_completion.description: Save the required forensic note to the event
task_completion.visual_evidence: The exact text 'CASE-999: Verified scan' is visible as a saved note, tag, or annotation attached to the specific failed login event in the EventLog Analyzer UI.

integrity.description: The agent used the ManageEngine EventLog Analyzer web GUI to perform the task
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the web browser and the EventLog Analyzer interface, rather than terminal commands (like curl or API scripts) being used to add the note.

integrity.description: The note was added to an actual log event within the application
integrity.visual_evidence: The note is clearly attached to a log row in the EventLog Analyzer interface, not just typed into a separate text editor, notepad, or unrelated web page.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the result
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser's developer tools (Inspect Element, DOM editor) are not open in the screenshots showing the final saved note.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target user is 'forensic_target'. There are exactly 5 injected failed SSH login logs for this user in the system. The agent must successfully attach a note to at least one of these specific events containing the exact text 'CASE-999: Verified scan'.
